name: My Beautiful Revenge
overview: The series, which tells the story of the beautiful coastal town of Güzelkoy, stars Leman (Burçin Terzioğlu) as a teacher, Şahika (Duygu Sarışın) as the mayor, Mine (Selin Şekerci) as a boutique owner, and Suzi (Gökçe Eyüboğlu) as a radio presenter. Everything begins when Leman returns to the town after years away and completely overturns the balance of power. "Ben Leman" tells the stories of four women, each with a mysterious and exciting tale that also encompasses their childhoods.
